tasks.subject: Task 0: Baseline install + capture lint state

{"files": ["package-lock.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm install succeeds", "lockfile exists", "build exits 0", "lint baseline captured"]}

tasks.subject: Task 1: Apply within-semver minor/patch updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** npm update for within-semver bumps.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "package-lock.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm outdated", "acceptanceCriteria": ["only out-of-scope majors remain", "build exits 0", "lint ≤ baseline"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: VOID - keep Biome (incorrect premise)
tasks.description: Dropped. Based on an incorrect premise: the project uses Biome (@biomejs/biome, biome.json, lint/format scripts), NOT ESLint+Prettier. biome.json must not be deleted; the lint/format tooling is unchanged and correct.
